title: Luffy and Zoro Refuse to Fight
description: Mock Town shows the crew a different kind of pirate: Bellamy and his men mock dreams while Nami searches for information about Sky Island.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this scene centers on Nami, Bellamy, Sarquiss, Mock Town pirate, Luffy. Mock Town shows the crew a different kind of pirate: Bellamy and his men mock dreams while Nami searches for information about Sky Island.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What'll you bet now? Your underwear? Haha...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'll be taking all your money then.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Haha... Oh, he cheated alright. Definitely.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: He's one dirty bastard, I tell ya!

summary: Mock Town shows the crew a different kind of pirate: Bellamy and his men mock dreams while Nami searches for information about Sky Island.
